title: tectaria incisa f. incisa
intro: Tectaria incisa f. incisa, also known as the incised tectaria fern or the incised shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tectaria incisa f. incisa include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through decoction, infusion, or topical application of its leaves, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these herbal preparations.
